home.title: 13TierList — Create & Share Tier Lists
home.description: Create beautiful image-based tier lists and share them with anyone
home.subtitle: Create stunning image-based tier lists, drag & drop to rank, and share with anyone — no account needed.
home.feature1Desc: Intuitively rank items by dragging them between tiers. Reorder within tiers too.
home.feature2Desc: Get a shareable link immediately. No login required — share with anyone.
home.feature3Desc: Add images via URL to create visual tier lists for games, anime, food, and more.

create.title: Create New Tier List
create.namePlaceholder: e.g., Best Fast Food, Favorite Anime 2024

editor.uploadPrompt: Upload items to start dragging them into tiers

draft.banner: You have unsaved changes from a previous session.
